snippet.title: Iman Troye, Naim Daniel - Terasing (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
In loving memory of Dato’ Sudirman, the original singer of ‘Terasing’. Special thanks to the composers & lyricists, Abdul Mannan Ngah & Habsah Hassan.

XO House Presents 
Iman Troye & Naim Daniel - Terasing (Official Music Video)

Executive Producer = Adib Hamdi (XO House)
Creative Director = Alia Elena (XO House)

Editor + Colorist = Naim Arman (XO House)

Assist Wardrobe = Izzani Rohaizat (XO House)


Lyrics

Verse
Kegelisahan didalam kedinginan
Meniti sepi keseorangan
Sebuah kematian yang tiada bernisan
Sendu mengiringi perpisahan

Ruang nan luas diri bergerak bebas
Namun keupayaanku terbatas
Segala mimpi menjadi api
Perit membakar diri

Chorus
Sebuah cinta dan harapan
Menjadi debu berterbangan
Tersekat nafasku kabur pandangan mataku
Amat tersiksa diriku
Kerna kehilanganmu

Oh mengapakah terus mengharap menanti
Walau cukup kusedari
Kau tak kan kembali

Verse 2
Pemergianmu mengisi permintaan
Biarpun dikau masih kuperlukan
Kita dikatakan pasangan bahagia
Kini terasing luka

snippet.title: LIVE | [BM] MPL MY Season 17 Minggu 6 Hari 2
snippet.description:
Tiada lagi ruang untuk kesilapan! Setiap hari kini menjadi pentas penebusan. Persoalannya, mampukah Team Flash bangkit meraih kemenangan mereka, atau adakah iG akan terus merampas peluang yang ada dan mengekalkan dominasi?

Vamos dan RRQ sedang giat mengumpul mata berharga demi mengukuhkan laluan ke playoffs. Tekanan semakin memuncak. Persoalannya, siapakah yang akan menang?

Dan akhirnya pertembungan yang dinanti! Dengan kehadiran dua pemain import yang membawa dimensi baharu, mampukah AC menebus kekalahan lalu dan akhirnya menumbangkan Gergasi Merah, atau SRG akan terus berdiri megah tanpa digugat?

Sabtu | 9 Mei 2026 
⚔️ iG vs FL - 2:30 PM
⚔️ RRQ vs VMS - 5:00 PM
⚔️ AC vs SRG - 8:15 PM

📌 MPL MY Arena, Level 6, Quill City Mall Convention Centre
🎟️ Pautan di bio

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

Talk about our future like we had a clue

In another life, I would be your girl

snippet.title: MPL TALK MALAYSIA S17 WEEK 6 : SRG UNI EXP BIDAN TERJUN
snippet.description:
MPL Talk MY Week 6. Playoffs MPL MY Season 17 kini semakin hampir, dan persaingan untuk merebut slot ke peringkat seterusnya menjadi semakin sengit.

Beberapa pasukan seperti SRG, Team Rey, dan Invictus Gaming telah berjaya mengukuhkan kedudukan serta mengamankan tempat ke playoffs. Namun dalam masa yang sama, pasukan seperti AC, VAMOS, BTRM, RRQ, dan FLASH masih lagi bergelut mencari mata penting untuk berada di zon yang lebih selesa.

Minggu ini juga scene MPL MY dikejutkan dengan perubahan besar apabila SRG tampil tanpa EXP Laner mereka, Kram, dan digantikan oleh Uni. Pada awalnya, SRG mengalami kekalahan 2-0 kepada AC, namun berjaya bangkit dan melakukan comeback pada hari berikutnya ketika menentang BTRM.

Perkara ini menjadi topik hangat dalam komuniti apabila ramai mula bercakap tentang bagaimana Uni mampu menyesuaikan diri dengan role EXP dalam tempoh yang singkat dan memberikan impak besar kepada pasukan.

Mari sama-sama saksikan perbincangan penuh bersama Abang Lord, Nevinne, Coach Rain, Sunfrost, dan Mars dalam episod terbaru MPL Talk MY Week 6.

Jangan lupa Like, Comment & Subscribe untuk lebih banyak content MPL Talk setiap minggu.

snippet.title: IMAYE (Official Lyric Video) | Shabir Sulthan | Srinisha Jayaseelan | Roshan Jamrock
snippet.description:
#MustDateThePlayboy #MDTP #SingaporeTamil #TamilSeries #TamilDrama #TamilLoveSeries #TamilRomance #YouthLoveStory #CollegeLove #TamilWebSeries #Vasantham #MeWatch #ZaynAndTara #TamilTrending #LoveDrama #TamilAudience #PlayboySeries #TamilCouple #RomanticSeries #SingaporeDrama #Shorts

‘IMAYE’ is a cinematic Tamil melody that blends classic melody, rap, R&B and Indian semi-classical influences into a contemporary soundscape.

Composed and written by Shabir Sulthan, the song is performed by Shabir Sulthan alongside Srinisha Jayaseelan and Roshan Jamrock. ‘IMAYE’ also serves as the official opening soundtrack of Mediacorp’s hit series Must Date The Playboy directed by trendsetting filmmaker T Suriavelan. 

Available on all major streaming platforms.

snippet.title: Devil Dinosaur: Prehistoric Powerhouse | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
From the prehistoric past to the front lines of Manhattan. 🦖
Ripped across dimensions and escaped from the Collector’s Gallery, Devil Dinosaur has arrived to protect the innocent. With the perfect balance of Moon Girl's brains and his own raw brawn, this dino-riffic hero is ready to stomp through Alchemax HQ to save his BFF. Don't let the name scare you—this gentle giant is a true powerhouse, armed with razor-sharp fangs and a force-field shield.

Season 8 arrives on May 15, 2026!

snippet.title: OFFICIAL TRAILER POLONG | DI PAWAGAM 28 MEI 2026
snippet.description:
Filem ini mengisahkan tentang seorang wartawan yang bercita-cita tinggi cuba membongkar sejarah hitam seorang bomoh pembunuh bersiri, dia tanpa sengaja telah membebaskan ‘Polong’, entiti iblis yang selama ini cuba dikurung oleh bomoh tersebut. Kini menjadi buruan mahluk syaitan itu, satu-satunya harapan sang wartawan hanyalah anak perempuan bomoh berkenaan yang kini hidup memencilkan diri. Kini, si waris perlu membuat pilihan yang ngeri,  sama ada menerima warisan puaka yang menghantuinya atau mencari jalan untuk memutuskan rantaian syaitan itu selamanya.

Filem oleh Zulkarnain Azhar
Barisan pelakon Mimi Lana, Fad Anuar, Jun Lojong, Namron, Nadiya Nisaa, Riezman Khuzaimi, Amir Nafis dan Elizad Sharifuddin. 

Polong, di Pawagam 28 Mei 2026. 

#Polong #DiaKembali

snippet.description:

⏬ Download / Stream the song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qMxX-QOV9tI

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎶 Jessie J
https://www.instagram.com/jessiej/

🎧 [LYRICS]: Jessie J - Price Tag ft. B.o.B

[Intro: Jessie J]
Hahaha, okay
Coconut Man, Moonheads and Pea
You ready?

[Verse 1: Jessie J]
Seems like everybody's got a price
I wonder how they sleep at night
When the sale comes first and the truth comes second
Just stop for a minute and smile
Why is everybody so serious?
Acting so damn mysterious
Got shades on your eyes, and your heels so high
That you can't even have a good time

[Pre-Chorus: Jessie J]
Everybody look to their left, huh
Everybody look to their right
Can you feel that? Yeah
We're paying with love tonight

[Chorus: Jessie J]
It's not about the money, money, money
We don't need your money, money, money
We just wanna make the world dance
Forget about the price tag
Ain't about the, uh, cha-ching, cha-ching
Ain't about the, yeah, ba-bling, ba-bling
Wanna make the world dance
Forget about the price tag (Okay)

[Verse 2: Jessie J]
We need to take it back in time
When music made us all unite
And it wasn't low blows and video hoes
Am I the only one getting tired?
Why is everybody so obsessed?
Money can't buy us happiness
Can we all slow down and enjoy right now?
Guarantee we'll be feeling alright

[Pre-Chorus: Jessie J]
Everybody look to their left (To their left)
Everybody look to their right (To their right)
Can you feel that? Yeah
We're paying with love tonight

[Chorus: Jessie J]
It's not about the money, money, money
We don't need your money, money, money
We just wanna make the world dance
Forget about the price tag
Ain't about the, uh, cha-ching, cha-ching
Ain't about the, yeah, ba-bling, ba-bling
Wanna make the world dance
Forget about the price tag

[Verse 3: B.o.B]
Yeah, yeah, well, keep the price tag (Yeah) and take the cash back
Just give me six strings (Six strings) and a half-stack (Half stack)
And you can, can keep the cars, leave me the garage
And all I, yes, all I need are keys and guitars
And guess what? Uh, in thirty seconds, I'm leaving to Mars (Mars)
Yeah, we leaping across (-cross) these undefeatable odds (Odds)
It's like this, man, you can't put a price on a life (Nah-ah)
We do this for the love, so we fight and sacrifice (Yuh) every night
So we ain't gon' stumble and fall, never, nah
Waiting to see this in the sign of defeat, uh-uh
So we gon' keep everyone moving their feet
So bring back the beat and then everyone sing
It's not about the money

[Chorus: Jessie J & B.o.B]
It's not about the money, money, money
We don't need your money, money, money
We just wanna make the world dance
Forget about the price tag
Ain't about the, uh, cha-ching, cha-ching
Ain't about the, yeah, ba-bling, ba-bling
Wanna make the world dance
Forget about the price tag (Hey! Hey!)
It's not about the money, money, money (We don't need it)
We don't need your money, money, money (No, I don't, we don't need it)
We just wanna make the world dance (Dance, dance your ass off)
Forget about the price tag (Ah, ah)
Ain't about the, uh, cha-ching, cha-ching
Ain't about the, yeah, ba-bling, ba-bling (It ain't about)
Wanna make the world dance (Yeah, yeah)
Forget about the price tag (Forget about the price tag)

[Outro: Jessie J]
(Ah, ah)
(Ah, ah)
(Ah, ah) Yeah, yeah, woah
(Ah, ah) Forget about the price tag, heh
